ipa: ňąjo ňąd ía ňąbai eňąskola ňąonti
gloss_en: I went to school yesterday.
notes: Perfective preverbal 'ja' [d ía] retains the medieval affricate ‚ü®j‚ü©=[d í], not the modern fricative (baxter1988); 1sg pronoun 'yo' [jo] with glide onset (baxterdesilva2004).

sentence: Eli ta kumi aros ku pesi.
ipa: ňąeli ňąta ňąkumi ňąaros ňąku ňąpesi
gloss_en: He is eating rice and fish.
notes: Imperfective 'ta' + verb (baxter_apics); connective 'ku' 'and/with'; single rhotic /r/ [r] in 'aros' (baxter1988).

ipa: ňąnus ňąlo…°u ňąbai ňąpreja ňąamiaŇč
gloss_en: We will go to the beach tomorrow.
notes: Irrealis/future 'logu'; 'amiang' 'tomorrow' shows Portuguese nasal vowel denasalised to oral vowel + coda [Ňč] (amanh√£>amiang) (baxter1988).

ipa: ňąbos ňąsabe ňąpapia ňąkristaŇč
gloss_en: Do you know how to speak Kristang?
notes: 2sg 'bos'; 'papia' 'to speak' < Pt papear; endonym 'Kristang' with denasalised final [Ňč] (baxterdesilva2004; baxter1988).

ipa: ňąŇčua ňąmule buňąnitu ňąd ía ňąt Ée…°a
gloss_en: A beautiful woman has arrived.
notes: Indefinite 'ngua' 'one/a' with syllabic word-initial nasal [Ňču] (baxter1988); ‚ü®ch‚ü©=[t É] retained affricate in 'chega' (baxter1988).

ipa: oňąlotu ňąnteŇč diňą…≤eru
gloss_en: They have no money.
notes: 3pl 'olotu'; negative-existential 'nteng' [nteŇč] with syllabic onset nasal (baxter1988); ‚ü®ny‚ü©=[…≤] palatal nasal in 'dinyeru' (baxterdesilva2004).

ipa: ňąjo ňąkere ňąbebe ňąa…°u
gloss_en: I want to drink water.
notes: 'kereh' 'want' ‚ÄĒ final etymological /r/ has no [h]/fricative reflex, Kristang lacks /h/ (baxter1988); serial 'kereh bebe' (baxter_apics).

sentence: Eli ta fai sibrisu na Singapura.
ipa: ňąeli ňąta ňąfai siňąbrisu ňąna siŇčaňąpura
gloss_en: He is/was working in Singapore.
notes: Attested APiCS example: 'fai sibrisu' 'to work' (light verb 'fai' + 'sibrisu' < servi√ßo), locative 'na' (baxter_apics; baxter1988).

ipa: aňąke kaňąt Éoru ňą…°randi ňąta ňąladra
gloss_en: That big dog is barking.
notes: Distal demonstrative 'ak√©'; ‚ü®ch‚ü©=[t É] in 'kachoru'; homorganic /nd/ cluster in 'grandi' (baxter1988).

sentence: Nus tudu ja kumi na kaza di eli.
ipa: ňąnus ňątudu ňąd ía ňąkumi ňąna ňąkaza ňądi ňąeli
gloss_en: We all ate at his house.
notes: Quantifier 'tudu'; genitive analytic 'di eli' 'of him' (no Pt inflected possessive); 'ja' [d ía] affricate (baxter1988).

sentence: Eli ja da yo dos figu.
ipa: ňąeli ňąd ía ňąda ňąjo ňądos ňąfi…°u
gloss_en: He gave me two children.
notes: Unmarked object 'yo'; numeral 'dos' 'two'; 'figu' 'son/child' < filho with / é/>/l/ then loss (baxter1988).

ipa: boňąlotu ňąta ňąkanta ňąna iňą…°reza
gloss_en: You (pl) are singing in the church.
notes: 2pl 'bolotu'; homorganic /nt/ in 'kanta'; 'igreza' with voiced [z] (baxter1988).

ipa: ňąisti ňąpesi ňąsta muňąitu saňąbrozu
gloss_en: This fish is very tasty.
notes: Proximal 'isti'; predicate 'sta'; 'sabrozu' 'tasty' with intervocalic [z] (baxterdesilva2004; baxter1988).

ipa: ňąjo ňąnadi ňąbai ňąamiaŇč
gloss_en: I will not go tomorrow.
notes: Negative-future 'nadi' (distinct from realis negator 'ngka'); denasalised coda [Ňč] in 'amiang' (baxter1988).

sentence: Ngua sen jenti ja bi festa.
ipa: ňąŇčua ňąsen ňąd íenti ňąd ía ňąbi ňąfesta
gloss_en: A hundred people came to the party.
notes: Numeral 'sen' 'hundred'; 'jenti' 'people' with ‚ü®j‚ü©=[d í]; motion verb 'bi' 'come' (baxter1988).

sentence: Sua pai ta fai sibrisu na kintal.
ipa: ňąsua ňąpai ňąta ňąfai siňąbrisu ňąna ňąkintal
gloss_en: His father works in the garden.
notes: Possessive 'sua'; 'kintal' 'yard/garden' < quintal with homorganic /nt/ cluster (baxter1988).

sentence: Nus ta papia ku sua irmang.
ipa: ňąnus ňąta ňąpapia ňąku ňąsua ňąirmaŇč
gloss_en: We are talking with his sister.
notes: 'irmang' 'sibling' < irm√£(o) with nasal vowel denasalised to coda [Ňč] (baxter1988).

sentence: Kambrang ku kanji teng na merkadu.
ipa: ňąkambraŇč ňąku ňąkand íi ňąteŇč ňąna meňąrkadu
gloss_en: Prawns and rice-porridge are in the market.
notes: Substrate/areal lexicon 'kambrang' 'prawn' and 'kanji' 'rice porridge' (< Tamil/Malay); homorganic /mb/ and /nd í/ clusters (baxterdesilva2004; baxter1988).

ipa: ňąeli ňąd ía ňąpiza ňąna kaňąmi…≤u
gloss_en: He stepped on the road.
notes: 'kaminyu' 'road' < caminho with ‚ü®ny‚ü©=[…≤] palatal nasal (baxterdesilva2004; baxter1988).

sentence: Ngka eli ja fika na kaza.
ipa: ňąŇčka ňąeli ňąd ía ňąfika ňąna ňąkaza
gloss_en: He did not stay at home.
notes: Attested APiCS negation: realis negator 'ngka' precedes the clause, syllabic onset nasal [Ňčk] (baxter_apics; baxter1988).
